name: Beacon Phase II-A Operator Key
fingerprint_method: sha256 over ASCII hex string of uncompressed pubkey
scope: advisory only — MAY inform, MAY NOT restart, MAY NOT block, MAY NOT change consensus
legal_notice: This is a public on-chain timestamp of the SOST Protocol operator Beacon II-A public key fingerprint, anchoring the canonical fingerprint in the chain itself for independent verification. It is not a patent, trademark, copyright, or legal ownership registration.
